about.title: CAYIT YÜKSEL
about.subtitle: Level 1 Bodybuilding Coach
about.bio1: Hi, I'm Cayit Yüksel, a Level 1 Bodybuilding Coach based in Turkey with approximately 10 years of fitness and bodybuilding experience.
about.bio2: Through the knowledge and experience I've gained over the years, I work with clients from different countries around the world through an online coaching system. My goal is to turn muscle gain, fat loss, strength increase, and bodybuilding goals into reality in a scientific and sustainable way.
about.bio3: My goal is not just physical change; it's to instill discipline, consistency, and a long-term lifestyle transformation.
